---
title: 'Twisted Root Burger Co'
date: '2012-02-09T22:54:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'The Life In Fort Worth Blog'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6537565594410773944'
blogger_filename: '/2012/02/twisted-root-roanoke.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/The Life In Fort Worth Blog/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Discover'
---

<h4 style="text-align: center;">
Twisted Root Burger Co</h4>
<div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
<strong style="color: black;"><a data-mce-href="http://twistedrootburgerco.com/wordpress/" href="http://twistedrootburgerco.com/wordpress/" style="color: #743399;" target="_blank">The Twisted Root</a></strong>&nbsp;is among my all time favorite burger joints in all of Texas.<br />
<br />
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/twisted-root-2-68d2876c0d83.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: right; float: right; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: 1em; text-align: center;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/twisted-root-2-68d2876c0d83.jpg" height="298" width="400" /></a>When you are in the mood for fast food nothing fits the bill like an Inn and Out, Carl's Jr, Whataburger, etc... but when you want to hang out for a little while; this rustic twisted restaurant fits the bill, even if it costs just a little bit more. The burgers are in the&nbsp;neighborhood&nbsp;of $9 a&nbsp;piece, sides and drinks sold&nbsp;separately. If two adults and two kids go all out you could easily spend $30 or more. If you share a drink and don't get sides you can get out for much less, but I call this place the place to indulge so break out a few extra dollars and enjoy.</div>
<div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
<strong style="color: black;">Why is it twisted?</strong>&nbsp;The restaurant starts with a rustic barn bar type feel.&nbsp;The&nbsp;decor is made up of rusted&nbsp;aluminium&nbsp;siding, wood benches, random tables, and beer containers as condiment holders. Why have napkins when you can have a roll of paper towels at each table?</div>
<div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<object class="BLOGGER-youtube-video" classid="clsid:D27CDB6E-AE6D-11cf-96B8-444553540000" codebase="http://download.macromedia.com/pub/shockwave/cabs/flash/swflash.cab#version=6,0,40,0" data-thumbnail-src="/images/imported/ytimg-googleusercontent-com/0-41e1fa4e0603.jpg" height="266" width="320"><param name="movie" value="https://youtube.googleapis.com/v/_Cic5cU5AGY&source=uds" /><param name="bgcolor" value="#FFFFFF" /><param name="allowFullScreen" value="true" /><embed width="320" height="266"  src="https://youtube.googleapis.com/v/_Cic5cU5AGY&source=uds" type="application/x-shockwave-flash" allowfullscreen="true"></embed></object></div>
<strong style="color: black;">Twisted Flavors</strong>: They have a&nbsp;root beer&nbsp;flavor that changes frequently, sometimes within one visit it could change if a keg runs dry. My favorite so far was<strong style="color: black;">&nbsp;watermelon root beer</strong>. However other flavors of root beer have been: cotton candy,&nbsp;raspberry, more. They also carry&nbsp;<strong style="color: black;">twisted condiments,</strong>&nbsp;such as ancho-chipotle-ketchup.</div>
<div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
My favorite burger when I go?&nbsp;Green Chile, Guac &amp; Pepperjack Burger&nbsp;<strong style="color: black;">7.99.</strong>&nbsp;This is a mouth watering burger with just enough spice to nice but not overwhelming. It's topped with guacamole and friend onions. Mmmmmm........</div>
<div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
<strong style="color: black;">Their solution to graffiti?</strong>&nbsp;Graffiti their own walls first!&nbsp;Black-chalkboard type paint around certain areas, like the bathroom, where odd sayings and thoughts are written for all to enjoy. My home location is in Roanoke, TX however there are many&nbsp;<a data-mce-href="http://twistedrootburgerco.com/wordpress/about/" href="http://twistedrootburgerco.com/wordpress/about/" style="color: #743399;" target="_blank"><strong style="color: black;">locations</strong>&nbsp;</a>around DFW now and more on the way it would seem.</div>
<div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
This place is so good that it even made it on to the food networks Diners Drive In's and Dives. I suggest you check out that review and then go yourself if you are near a location... it's worth the drive... really!<br />
<br />
<h4 style="text-align: center;">
<br /></h4>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<h4 style="text-align: center;">
Check Out You Tube:</h4>
</div>
<div style="text-align: center;">
<iframe allowfullscreen="" frameborder="0" height="315" src="//www.youtube.com/embed/o3JB1zWis_4?list=FLmIbthAElOHz1Y4C2LMYjTw" width="560"></iframe>

</div>
<div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
<div style="text-align: center;">
<br /></div>
</div>
<div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
<div style="text-align: center;">
<a data-mce-href="http://www.urbanspoon.com/r/13/1462184/restaurant/Twisted-Root-Burger-Company-Roanoke" href="http://www.urbanspoon.com/r/13/1462184/restaurant/Twisted-Root-Burger-Company-Roanoke" style="color: #743399;"><img alt="Twisted Root Burger Company on Urbanspoon" data-mce-src="/images/imported/www-urbanspoon-com/biglink-597aba3d38d3.gif" data-mce-style="border: none; width: 200px; height: 146px;" src="/images/imported/www-urbanspoon-com/biglink-597aba3d38d3.gif" style="border: none; cursor: default; height: 146px; margin: 0px; width: 200px;" /></a></div>
</div>
<div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
<br />
<br />
<b>Life In Fort Worth By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a></b><br />
<h4>
<ul>
<li>New to the blog?&nbsp;<a href="http://www.lifeinfortworth.com/p/about.html" target="_blank">Start HERE</a></li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>Click&nbsp;<a href="http://eepurl.com/OjOcn" target="_blank">HERE to Subscribe</a>&nbsp;by email.&nbsp;</li>
</ul>
</h4>
<div>
<b><br /></b></div>
<div>
<b>What is YOUR favorite thing about Texas? Comment Below!</b></div>
<div>
<div style="color: black; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: medium;">
<b><br /></b></div>
</div>
</div>
